subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Compliance with H4P4(1) is verified for the provision of natural light in all habitable rooms when the average daylight factor for each window is determined in accordance with the following formula: Average Daylight Factor= W A Tθ (1− R 2 ) MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr hacaqGLbGaaeOCaiaabggacaqGNbGaaeyzaiaabccacaqGebGaaeyy aiaabMhacaqGSbGaaeyAaiaabEgacaqGObGaaeiDaiaabccacaqGgb GaaeyyaiaabogacaqG0bGaae4BaiaabkhacqGH9aqpdaWcaaqaaiaa ol.li: WMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaam4vaaaa@36D0@ R0lGODlhEgASAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEgASAAACJYSPqcvt34IEMtC6rNE0Hs1lG+hYZhedp6c+ 0wW9b/lB9o3nUAEAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHJBQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2ljQ29kZVBh Z2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBFeHRyYQAS AAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQ D0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQACAINXAAAA ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAzwTw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNs YXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAg LS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtaT5X PC9taT48L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGBAAA AAAAADs= = the net area of the light transmitting area of the window (m2); and

AMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyqaaaa@36BA@ R0lGODlhEAARAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEAARAAACH4SPqcvtGN4JUcb6rjW41b5QotOBSemd4QiI pgTHSgEAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHJBQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEF VGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WP RC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/ SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQACAINBAAAAACH/C01h dGhUeXBlMDAzwTw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1 QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1h dGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtaT5BPC9taT48 L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGAgAAAAAAADs= = the total area of the internal wall, floor and ceiling surfaces (m2); and

TMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamivaaaa@36CD@ R0lGODlhDgARAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAADgARAAACHISPqcsdD2EKhxp7kcWKu6aBmQh4jNmREcm2 YAEAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHJBQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGlt ZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9B UPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQ D0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQACAINUAAAAACH/C01hdGhU eXBlMDAzwTw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVA TWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGgg eG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtaT5UPC9taT48L21h dGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGAgAAAAAAADs= = the diffuse light transmittance of the window; and

θMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaeqiUdehaaa@37AA@ R0lGODlhDQASAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAADQASAAACHoSPqcvtGGILhyprcE06x98B3chd0CKJobc+ 7gsDBQAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMcoFAQAHBERTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVU aW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9E L0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I 9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIEhLgDcQAAACH/C01h dGhUeXBlMDAzyDw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1 QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1h dGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtaT4mI3gwM0I4 OzwvbWk+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgQA AAAAAAA7 = visible sky angle in degrees, measured in a plane normal to and from the centre of the window; and

RMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOuaaaa@36CB@ R0lGODlhEAARAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEAARAAACIISPqcvdAaEz4VR3QV57q+x90XSFn0WiT2Jq I9VO8swUACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxyQUBAAcERFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwAR BVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9F j0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9B f0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDUgAAAAAh/wtN YXRoVHlwZTAwM8E8P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JA NUA1QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxt YXRoIHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bWk+UjwvbWk+ PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgIAAAAAAAA7 = the area-weighted average reflectance of area AMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyqaaaa@36BA@ R0lGODlhEAARAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEAARAAACH4SPqcvtGN4JUcb6rjW41b5QotOBSemd4QiI pgTHSgEAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHJBQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEF VGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WP RC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/ SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQACAINBAAAAACH/C01h dGhUeXBlMDAzwTw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1 QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1h dGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtaT5BPC9taT48 L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGAgAAAAAAADs=.

callout.p: H4V2 is equivalent to F6V3 in NCC Volume One. Guidance on the use of F6V3 can be found in the Guide to NCC Volume One, and is applicable to the use of H4V2.
